name: 史料评估（OPVL）
subject: history
curriculum_points: Students will be able to evaluate the value and limitations of historical sources, with reference to their origin, purpose, and content (HL/SL, Paper 1 skill).
Students will be able to analyse the tone, perspective, and argument presented in a source, placing it in its historical context.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 历史时间轴：朝代/事件节点交互，点击展开详情卡片

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「史料评估（OPVL）」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：Students will be able to evaluate the value and limitations of historical sources, with reference to their origin, purpo…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：Students will be able to analyse the tone, perspective, and argument presented i… 对理解「史料评估（OPVL）」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
